reviews.comment:
Buenos muchachos.Aveces apurados por el caudal de gente.Lo que no entiendo de esa estacion es porqué no tienen doble mano de circulación para los combustibles.Si uno viene del Sur hay que volver a girar para reabastecer.

(Translated by Google)
Good guys. Sometimes they're rushed because of the crowds. What I don't understand about that station is why they don't have two lanes for fuel. If you're coming from the south, you have to turn around again to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2aTQ2RFpREAE

reviews.comment:
Si bien cargamos combustible, la usamos para passr la noche con nuestra carpa de techo. Preguntamos si podíamos y muy amables nos dijeron que si.

(Translated by Google)
Although we filled up with fuel, we used it to spend the night in our roof tent. We asked if we could, and they kindly agreed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2dy1MazFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Austera en cuanto a comidas, pero ideal para parar en medio del camino a recargar agua y comprar galletitas o chocolates. Buena atención del personal.

(Translated by Google)
Basic food, but ideal for stopping along the way to refill your water bottle and buy cookies or chocolates. Good service from the staff.
